title: Decimate COLLAPSE to a target face count
when_to_use: Mesh con face_count > 500_000 (R006). Riduce a target_faces preservando silhouette. Per FDM 0.4mm il range tipico è 100k-200k facce; oltre, lo slicer rallenta senza beneficio visibile.
preconditions: face_count > target_faces (altrimenti il decimate è no-op)

target_faces.description: Target triangle count. FDM 0.4mm sweet spot: 100k-200k.

steps.label: Make target active and compute ratio
steps.code:
import bpy
for o in bpy.context.selected_objects:
    o.select_set(False)
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
obj.select_set(True)
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
current = len(obj.data.polygons)
target = {target_faces}
ratio = max(0.01, min(1.0, target / current)) if current > 0 else 1.0
print(f'Current faces: {{current}}, target: {{target}}, ratio: {{ratio:.4f}}')
# Stash on the object for the next step (avoid mutating module globals).
obj['_decimate_ratio'] = ratio

steps.label: Add Decimate modifier (COLLAPSE)
steps.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
mod = obj.modifiers.new(name='AutoDecimate', type='DECIMATE')
mod.decimate_type = 'COLLAPSE'
mod.ratio = float(obj.get('_decimate_ratio', 0.5))
mod.use_collapse_triangulate = True
print(f'Decimate ratio set to {{mod.ratio:.4f}}')

steps.label: Apply the modifier
steps.code:
import bpy
obj = bpy.data.objects['{object_name}']
bpy.context.view_layer.objects.active = obj
bpy.ops.object.modifier_apply(modifier='AutoDecimate')
if '_decimate_ratio' in obj:
    del obj['_decimate_ratio']
print(f'Decimate applied. Final face count: {{len(obj.data.polygons)}}')

expect.watertight: should not regress from True to False

verification.notes: Decimate COLLAPSE can occasionally introduce non-manifold edges; if so chain repair_basic after this playbook.
